category.scope_note: EV charger compliance comparison for Morocco export.

title.en: China-to-Morocco EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Morocco IMANOR NM standards, IEC 61851 adoption, IEC 62196 connector requirements versus China GB/T 20234, ONEE grid requirements, EV policy, and 50 Hz system considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电设备文件与摩洛哥IMANOR NM标准、IEC 61851采标、IEC 62196插座要求（对比中国GB/T 20234）、ONEE电网要求、EV政策及50 Hz系统差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電設備文件與摩洛哥IMANOR NM標準、IEC 61851採標、IEC 62196插座要求（對比中國GB/T 20234）、ONEE電網要求、EV政策及50 Hz系統差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IMANOR scope determination, ONEE grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Morocco IMANOR, ONEE, AMEE, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IMANOR适用范围裁定、ONEE并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行摩洛哥IMANOR、ONEE、AMEE及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IMANOR適用範圍裁定、ONEE併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行摩洛哥IMANOR、ONEE、AMEE及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Morocco, the critical gap is the connector standard: Morocco's IMANOR pathway aligns with IEC 62196-2 (Type 2, Mennekes) for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 (CCS Combo 2) for DC fast charging, whereas Chinese products commonly use GB/T 20234.2 (AC) and GB/T 20234.3 (DC) connectors, which are not interchangeable. Charger safety follows IEC 61851 as adopted by IMANOR NM, and ONEE grid-connection rules under loi 13-09 apply for public or semi-public infrastructure. A hardware connector change plus IEC 61851 test report is typically required.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备出口摩洛哥时，关键差距在于插座标准：摩洛哥IMANOR路径对交流充电采用IEC 62196-2（Type 2，Mennekes），直流快充采用IEC 62196-3（CCS Combo 2），而中国产品通常使用GB/T 20234.2（交流）和GB/T 20234.3（直流）插座，两者不可互换。充电设备安全遵循IMANOR NM采标的IEC 61851，公共或半公共充电基础设施适用loi 13-09框架下的ONEE并网规则。通常需要更换硬件插座并提供IEC 61851测试报告。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備出口摩洛哥時，關鍵差距在於插座標準：摩洛哥IMANOR路徑對交流充電採用IEC 62196-2（Type 2，Mennekes），直流快充採用IEC 62196-3（CCS Combo 2），而中國產品通常使用GB/T 20234.2（交流）和GB/T 20234.3（直流）插座，兩者不可互換。充電設備安全遵循IMANOR NM採標的IEC 61851，公共或半公共充電基礎設施適用loi 13-09框架下的ONEE併網規則。通常需要更換硬體插座並提供IEC 61851測試報告。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
